tasks.title: Create Hello World HTML file
tasks.description: Create a new file `index.html` in the project root. The file should be a valid HTML5 document displaying the text 'Hello world' on the page. Use a proper DOCTYPE declaration, <html>, <head>, and <body> tags. Set the page title to 'Hello World'. Place the text 'Hello world' inside an <h1> tag in the body. No external dependencies or frameworks are needed.
acceptance_criteria: index.html exists in the project root
File is valid HTML5 with DOCTYPE declaration
Page contains the text 'Hello world' in an <h1> element
File opens correctly in a browser and displays 'Hello world'
